subcodes.first_line: We make mention of those who have attained to the Days of God and His recognition, and who turned unto Him when every idolater turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر الذین فازوا بایام الله و عرفانه و اقبلوا الیه اذ اعرض عنه کل مشرک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action
